eval.reason: All implementation requirements met — RUN_STARTED thread-local added, set in init_global, checked in both mark_run_completed and mark_run_completed_with_error via ensure_run_started(), RunCompletionGuard::drop is transitively protected, comprehensive unit test verifies retroactive RunStarted emission, and both build + tests pass.
